title: Colored Wool
description: An API Mod that makes it easier to make Minecraft Mods.
body:
This Mod doesn't add anything but only makes it so it's easy to make Minecraft mods with that API Mod. If you're a Minecraft Mod Developer and want to use this API Mod. You either have to use the **Modrinth API (Modrinth Maven)** to add this API Mod to your mod or use a custom way which I didn't make because I don't know how.

What features does this mod add?

This mod only adds custom items and block creators that make it easy to make custom items/blocks (there will be more features that I will add later on)

Why you should get this mod?

If a mod is using this API mod, you have to add this mod because the mod that's using this mod will not work without it.

Does this mod have any critical and malicious code in this mod?

Since the mod is only for making other Minecraft mods easy to make, it shouldn't have any malicious code in it.
